allow: Bash(psql postgresql://postgres:dev@localhost:5432/postgres -c "SELECT id, public_id, event_type, card_id, player_id, round_id, created_at, metadata FROM game_events ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 15;")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
deps: add Socket.io for WebSocket support

Install Socket.io server (backend) and client (frontend) packages
to enable real-time multiplayer communication.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat(backend): add WebSocket server infrastructure

Create WebSocket server with JWT authentication and event emitter
service for real-time multiplayer communication.

- WebSocket server integrated with existing HTTP server
- JWT authentication middleware supporting cookies and headers
- Game events emitter service with typed event payloads
- Room-based messaging (one room per game)
- Event types: lobby, gameplay, rounds, and game state changes
- Automatic reconnection handling

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "feat(backend): emit WebSocket events for gameplay actions

Add real-time event emissions when players give clues or make guesses.
Events trigger React Query cache invalidation on all connected clients.

- Emit clue_given event after successful clue
- Emit guess_made event after successful guess
- Events include gameId, roundNumber, turnId, and playerId")

Bash(git commit -m "feat(backend): emit WebSocket events for lobby actions

Add real-time event emissions for lobby operations to sync all clients.

- Emit game_started when game begins
- Emit player_joined when players are added
- Emit cards_dealt when cards are dealt to round
- All events broadcast to game room for instant updates")

Bash(git commit -m "feat(frontend): add WebSocket client infrastructure

Create WebSocket client with React hooks for real-time multiplayer.

- WebSocketProvider with automatic reconnection handling
- useGameRoom hook for joining/leaving game rooms
- useWebSocketInvalidation hook to sync React Query with events
- Connection status tracking (connected/disconnected/reconnecting)
- Type-safe event payloads matching backend")

Bash(git commit -m "feat(frontend): integrate WebSocket provider at app root

Wrap application with WebSocketProvider to enable real-time connections.

- WebSocketProvider inside QueryClientProvider
- Auto-connect enabled on app load
- All components can now access WebSocket context")

Bash(git commit -m "feat(frontend): enable real-time updates in GameDataProvider

Connect WebSocket events to React Query cache invalidation for live updates.

- Auto-join game room when gameId is available
- Listen for all game events and invalidate relevant queries
- Players now see updates in real-time when others make moves
- Completes the multiplayer implementation loop")

Bash(git commit -m "feat: add team header with pulsing symbol to codemaster dashboard

Replace mission log section with team header showing:
- Team symbol (diamond/square) with LED-style glow effect
- Team name and role (CODEMASTER) with underline
- Subtle pulse animation on symbol

Also refactor cover card symbols to use clean layered divs
instead of CSS pseudo-elements for better maintainability.")
